title: site_fix_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the fixing room: a record of the catalog/site edits the site_writer agent applied to the working tree (uncommitted) in response to the gaps listing carried by the verdict.

applied.description: True if every gaps entry was addressed by at least one edit; false if the agent gave up on one or more entries (blockers[] must then be populated).

summary.description: One-paragraph narrative of what was changed and why — should cite each touched file (new catalog entries + patched site copy).

files_changed.description: Every file the agent created or edited in the working tree, repo-relative (new features/<id>.yaml entries, patched tools/site/src/** or docs/**). May be empty only when applied=false and blockers explain why.

change.description: One sentence on what was created or changed in this file.

unresolved.description: gaps entries (by target) that were NOT addressed. Empty when applied=true.

target.description: The gap's target (feature id or file path).

reason.description: Why the agent skipped this entry (ambiguous fix, needs a demo recording it cannot produce, missing source, etc).

blockers.description: Populated when applied=false. Each entry describes one reason the run could not complete.
